title: For columns that don't support background color changes (like date columns) using API
excerpt:
Hello, 
It looks like there’s no way to change the background color of a column using the API. 
But what options do I have? 
I just want to be able to paint the column background red. 
Thanks

posts.author: whiletrue111 (whiletrue111)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
It looks like there’s no way to change the background color of a column using the API.
But what options do I have?
I just want to be able to paint the column background red.
Thanks

posts.author: david5 (clarks)
posts.cookedHtml: If the API doesn’t support changing the column background, try using CSS styling or JavaScript to modify it dynamically. You can apply CSS classes or use JavaScript (e.g., .style.backgroundColor = ‘red’;). Another option is checking if the API allows custom rendering or conditional formatting.
